steps.title: Identify the initial condition
steps.content: The phrase when the flask was placed on the counter refers to the starting moment, which is t = 0 minutes. We need to find g(0).

steps.title: Substitute t = 0 and use the exponent rule
steps.content:
Substitute t = 0 into the function:
$$g(0) = 289 + (355 - 289)(2.72)^{-0.098(0)}$$
Since any nonzero number raised to the power 0 equals 1:
$$(2.72)^{0} = 1$$
The exponential term simplifies away, leaving:
$$g(0) = 289 + (355 - 289)(1) = 289 + 66 = 355$$
The approximate temperature when the flask was placed on the counter was 355 kelvins.
